testcase.name: testEmptyFormShowsValidation

failure.message: Inline validation error should appear when form is submitted empty expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Inline validation error should appear when form is submitted empty expected [true] but found [false] at com.docx.tests.PatientLoginTest.testEmptyFormShowsValidation(PatientLoginTest.java:55) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1612) ... Removed 32 stack frames

testcase.name: testInvalidEmailFormat

failure.message: Field error should appear for an invalid email format expected [true] but found [false]

Removed 32 stack frames

testcase.name: testShortPasswordValidation

failure.message: Field error should appear for a password that is too short expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: testEmptyFormValidation

failure.message: Validation errors should appear for empty form submission expected [true] but found [false]
